---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How would you expect this to work? Describe the behavior from a user's perspective.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, references, or links to related issues if applicable.
